programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Portillo meets the craftsmen behind the Victorian furniture trade, discovers how George Bradshaw helped save Britain's canal heritage, and sees Shakespeare as a 19th-century railway tourist.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Defining The Path to Deeper Holiness (1)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team answers questions from students about God and the bible.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: This week we have another go at our new series memory verse, 'Cody & Brody' are back with some 'Groovie Smoothies', Jonny and Nicole play a round of Headbandz.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, with the vision of expressing their faith.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike walks among the stars in Hollywood and noshes on some British pub classics with fellow vlogger Jo Franco.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Jared Cooke's story depicts how his past addiction led him down a dark path. His redemption and recovery from these learned and highly reinforcing behaviour can be overcome with a willingness to do the work and accepting help.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane unexpectedly dies, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery haunting her neighbourhood.

programme.title: Stealing the Show
programme.desc: What's a group of theatre nerds to do when their mentor is arrested? Combine their skills, plan a heist to exonerate him, and pull it off without getting caught by the FBI!

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Special Guest Speaker: David Diga Hernandez The Baptism with the Holy Spirit
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: St Nicholas - St Nick or Santa?
programme.desc: Every year, baby Jesus and Santa dominate all Christmas imagery. In this episode we discover his fascinating 1700 year evolution from a bishop of ancient Turkey to Santa Clause.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Host Jeni Molitor and Casey Cole travel to the beautiful island of Puerto Rico where they find new adventures, try exotic foods, and minister to the next generation of young women.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.sub-title: I_m Not Doing This By Myself
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Stand You Can Take Today
programme.desc: Each of us are to be salt and light in the world and are to stand for Christ in the world.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Flip that Romance
programme.desc: Jules and Lance once flipped a property together, but broke up in the process. Now rivals, renovating opposite sides of a duplex can they flip their romance as well?

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Billy Graham teaches about that still small voice. Mark 6 (Memphis 1978).

programme.title: When We Last Spoke
programme.desc: Two sisters are raised by grandparents in the town of Fireside. Humour and heartbreak are served with whipped cream in this heartwarming tale of family, friendship and forgiveness.

programme.title: Come Alive
programme.desc: What would our world look like if more churches followed the example Jesus gave us to serve the poor and needy? The heartwarming story of the Christian Care Centre will challenge pastors, church planters, and church members alike.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Lies Between Friends
programme.desc: A wealthy family's world is turned upside down when the 18-year-old daughter of a family friend moves in with them for a few months.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: Rising from humble beginnings and overcoming personal challenges, singer Gloria Gaynor soars to the top of the music charts with her legendary hit, I Will Survive.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance of harassment and aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna's obsessive fantasy of a perfect life with Leo shatters, forcing her to confront harsh reality and the truth about their relationship, with dire consequences.

programme.title: My Sister's Serial Killer Boyfriend
programme.desc: Maddie, a local reporter investigating a series of killings targeting similar looking women, is caught off guard when her younger sister Olivia is attacked in her own home.

programme.title: Greed: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets a handsome benefactor and entrepreneur, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her, in an effort to be part of his world.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she must make a tough decision.

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: Chelsea FC v Los Angeles

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: Inter Miami v SE Palmeias

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: SE Palmeiras v Al Ahly FC
programme.sub-title: SE Palmeiras v Al Ahly FC
programme.desc: With draws in both of their opening matches, a win for either side could virtually secure a spot in the knockout stage.

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: SE Palmeiras v FC Porto
programme.desc: With both clubs favoured to come out of Group A, this battle between Brazilian club Palmeiras & Portuguese giant Porto could have big implications.

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: R16: Palmeiras v Botafogo
programme.desc: Another chapter in what's rapidly becoming the defining duel of modern Brazilian football, Palmerias & Botafogo meet in the Round of 16.

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: R16: SL Benfica v Chelsea
programme.desc: The Blues face their toughest challenge of the Club World Cup in Group C winners, Benfica.

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: QF: Fluminense v Al Hilal

programme.title: FIFA CWC Mini: MCI v WAC

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: The team races to rescue unresponsive cliff jumpers; Hina tries to navigate family issues; Will and Em hope to get over each other by rebounding with other people.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: The team searches for two missing teenagers; Will does not get along with District 7's new team member; Em receives a surprise visit from her estranged mother.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf

programme.title: Stargirl
programme.desc: Courtney's seemingly perfect life in Los Angeles gets upended with a move to Nebraska. Meanwhile, Courtney discovers that Pat is harbouring a major secret about his past.

programme.title: Stargirl
programme.desc: After Courtney has an unexpected run-in with a member of the Injustice Society of America, Pat reveals the truth to her about their history.

programme.title: Stargirl
programme.desc: After a dangerous confrontation with a member of the Injustice Society of America, Pat warns Courtney to back down from her attempts to go after them. When she encounters a message from them, she urges Pat to help.

programme.title: Stargirl
programme.desc: After realising that she needs the extra help, Courtney sets out to recruit new members to the Justice Society of America. Pat's suspicion is piqued after a bizarre conversation with one of the town's residents.

programme.title: Stargirl
programme.desc: As Courtney sets her sights on recruiting more members to the Justice Society of America, Pat finds himself one step closer to learning which ISA members may be in Blue Valley.

programme.desc: As Pat teaches the JSA the importance of teamwork, the ISA converge to figure out who is trying to take them down. As the school prepares for homecoming, Cindy lashes out against her father's strict rules.

programme.title: Stargirl

programme.title: Stargirl

programme.title: Stargirl

programme.title: Come Alive
programme.desc: What would our world look like if more churches followed the example Jesus gave us to serve the poor and needy? The heartwarming story of the Christian Care Centre will challenge pastors, church planters, and church members alike.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-1
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of The Ark
programme.desc: Pastor Bev Mortlock preaches on what it is to not lose sight of the Ark and to leave our limitation at the cross. Because of this, we are able to move forward without any limitation or restriction on our lives.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Betrayal can wreck the lives of both the betrayer and the betrayed. The envy of Joseph's brothers led them to do horrible things, but God was at work in the life of Joseph.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: What is the Kingdom of God? My daughter, Emily Ruonala, takes a deep dive to uncover the truth about what this really means for our lives.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series - Part 1
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What does the Bible say about spiritual gifts and the leadership of the Holy Spirit in our lives? Joyce and Ginger talk candidly about the supernatural.

programme.title: John Wesley - The Man and His Mission
programme.desc: Keith Garner visits historical locations, elegant chapels and bustling city centres as he discovers the impact of the work of John Wesley, 200 years after his death.

programme.title: Red Dust Challenge
programme.desc: A team of experienced disaster response volunteers, powered by mateship and determination, ride bicycles across the Simpson Desert to raise money for Australian charity Global Care, while lockdowns threaten to derail their adventure.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Aspiring Portland chef Cleo Morelli tries to win a food-truck competition while the competition tries to win her heart.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Defining The Path to Deeper Holiness (2)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson meets local hero George Parsonage, who has saved hundreds of people from the river Clyde.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: When It Rains, It Pours - Part 1
programme.desc: Feeling overwhelmed by challenges? Today, Joyce, Ginger, Erin, and Holly Wagner share life-changing lessons to help you endure tough times and find hope on the other side.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson meets local hero George Parsonage, who has saved hundreds of people from the river Clyde.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Harriet Tubman: They Called Her Moses
programme.desc: Discover the real Harriet Tubman in this compelling documentary. Narrated by Alfrelynn Roberts it features expert interviews and remarkable early 20th century audio recordings of African-American spirituals sung by former slaves.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.sub-title: Back To The City In A Hurry
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she must make a tough decision.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Monica is proven innocent after being wrongfully arrested for murder. As charges are dropped, the police shift focus to Simone, who has vanished while bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. His boss Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: Dream: Find Your Significance
programme.desc: This introduction to the documentary series Dream explores nine stories of people who have found purpose when they embraced their God-given dreams, including excerpts from the stories featured in the episodes plus more.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Live Life Above The Sun Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary's newspaper article creates waves when she questions Lucas's judgement. Allie discusses her birth father with Nathan, and Elizabeth realises Little Jack is growing up.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you struggle with anger or strife? Today, Joyce shares how to let go of anger and how to foster unity, replacing offense with God's love and peace.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson meets local hero George Parsonage, who has saved hundreds of people from the river Clyde.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Beyond the Fire: Resilience
programme.desc: This program takes an honest look at the frustrations and triumphs on the road to recovery three years after the Black Summer bushfire crisis.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: John Bunyan spends his days in prison, separated from his family. If he would agree to stop preaching, John could walk out a free man! Why does he choose to stay in jail, and how will he serve his Lord in this place?

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.sub-title: Adam and Eve, Noah, Abraham and Sarah
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Defining The Path to Deeper Holiness (2)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Martin Luther - Man of the Millennium
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: A plan is hatched to catch Chief Tomlinson while Tre conducts his own separate investigation.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt7
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you struggle with anger or strife? Today, Joyce shares how to let go of anger and how to foster unity, replacing offense with God's love and peace.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: One love can change your life. One life can change the world. Rediscover the wonder of love in I STILL BELIEVE, based on the real-life story of chart-topping singer Jeremy Camp.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009, Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart, and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: Trapped in the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Lured into an unwelcome reunion at a vacant ski lodge, former college friends find themselves in a fight for their lives when they become the target of an unseen adversary.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: The kidnapping and sudden reappearance of Ruth Finley leave investigators scrambling for answers.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: One love can change your life. One life can change the world. Rediscover the wonder of love in I STILL BELIEVE, based on the real-life story of chart-topping singer Jeremy Camp.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Billy Graham teaches about that still small voice. Mark 6 (Memphis 1978).

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-1
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series - Part 1
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: What is the Kingdom of God? My daughter, Emily Ruonala, takes a deep dive to uncover the truth about what this really means for our lives.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are anger and strife affecting your life? Today, Joyce shares on the importance of letting go of offence and embracing a life filled with peace.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous, exciting and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys doing Gods work!

programme.title: Miraculous Victories of Israel
programme.desc: What happens when the God of Israel intervenes in the battles of His people? Miraculous victories occur - victories that are sometimes inexplicable and often unbelievable.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Treasures of Qumran - The Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Just As I Am: A Journey of Faith and Redemption - Charlotte Elliot
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is baptism required for salvation? What about death bed confessions?

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are anger and strife affecting your life? Today, Joyce shares on the importance of letting go of offence and embracing a life filled with peace.

programme.title: A Marriage Made in Heaven
programme.desc: It appears Demetri Chicopoulos is living a charmed life, but he has lost his mother and recently gone through a divorce. In a prayerful moment Demetri asks God if he could just relive one week of his life.

programme.title: Tending Clouds
programme.desc: The extraordinary life of Reaksmey, sold to a pedophile by her mother and rescued by an anti-trafficking organisation. With her past behind her, Reaksmey is now moving back to her homeland of Cambodia determined to help others like her.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Dying to Win
programme.desc: A gymnast gets caught in a web of lies when her mother and stepfather are found murdered in the family home.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: Dying For A Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Monica is a young host of one of LA's top morning shows. Reeling from the death of her beloved father and a recent breakup, she's ready to focus on moving forward with her life.

programme.title: Trapped in Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: College student Erin becomes trapped in her dorm room during Spring Break when a classmate's harmless adoration turns into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: Stargirl

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: Batman is dead, and his adopted son is framed for the killing. Along with the children of some of Batman's enemies, this team must come together to become its next generation of saviours known as the Gotham Knights.

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: To try to clear their names, Turner, Duela, Cullen, Harper and Carrie head back to the scene of the crime in search of Bruce Wayne's journals. Harvey digs into the investigation.

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: After their leader is taken down by Carrie, the Mutant Gang retaliate against Gotham by taking hostages, forcing Turner, Duela and Harper to come out of hiding to save them.

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: After discovering potential leads in their investigation, Turner and Harper investigate a possible connection between Bruce Wayne's death and the mysterious death of a lawyer.

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: A plan to take down the Court of Owls leads the team to a notorious mobster family, the McKillens. Meanwhile, Carrie and Stephanie prepare for Gotham Academy's Parents Luncheon.

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: As Joe Chill is set to be executed for the murder of Bruce Wayne's parents, he turns to Harvey to make one final request - to speak with Turner. Stephanie seeks help from her dad.

programme.title: Gotham Knights
programme.desc: After a series of art heists in Gotham, Turner and the Knights turn their attention to a possible connection to the Court of Owls. Duela and Carrie seek answers about The Talon.

programme.desc: A series of cryptic clues leads Turner and Duela to one of the Court's secret meetings. Stephanie turns to her father for help with her mum's addiction.

programme.desc: Duela's birthday reunion with her mum unearths shocking information. Stephanie is forced to choose between her family and the Knights.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.sub-title: The Biblical Attitude to Money Pt1
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: You need to know that you are on this earth with a purpose. God has called you to build His Kingdom. In today's episode be inspiried by the Holy spirit to get back on track with your calling in Life.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: There is a myth when it comes to business leadership of the "self-made" leader that lacks credibility. The reality is that all leaders are shaped and influenced by others.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Donut holes and chili bowls are the star of the show when Mike takes a trip to the nation's capital; Mike talks about DC's secret passageways and ends up finding some of his own in a spooky mansion.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Charles Babbage - The TRUE Father of Modern Computing
programme.desc: Charles Babbage's brilliant mind was way ahead of its time. Babbage invented a fully functional mechanical calculator that became the foundation of the modern-day computer.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series - Part 1
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Betrayal can wreck the lives of both the betrayer and the betrayed. The envy of Joseph's brothers led them to do horrible things, but God was at work in the life of Joseph.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Life can be unpredictable, but God is always faithful! Today, find out how to tap into God's unwavering support, found in the promises of His Word.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: The Power of Jesus in Galilee
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Host Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous, exciting and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: What is the Kingdom of God? My daughter, Emily Ruonala, takes a deep dive to uncover the truth about what this really means for our lives.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: As a teen, Karli felt she could never live up to the expectations she thought others had of her. Seeking approval or attention from other people to fit in, came at the expense of developing a true sense of self.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary's newspaper article creates waves when she questions Lucas's judgement. Allie discusses her birth father with Nathan, and Elizabeth realises Little Jack is growing up.

programme.title: Living The Dream
programme.desc: In the episode, Tori and Jason, renovate Dixie Sunflower from a junky house that is falling apart to a spacious and comfortable design.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Walking in the Footsteps of Faith
programme.desc: Discover how giants of the faith like Mother Theresa, Martin Luther, and David Livingston lived following Steve walking in their footsteps!

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Billy Graham teaches about that still small voice. Mark 6 (Memphis 1978).

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Life can be unpredictable, but God is always faithful! Today, find out how to tap into God's unwavering support, found in the promises of His Word.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary's newspaper article creates waves when she questions Lucas's judgement. Allie discusses her birth father with Nathan, and Elizabeth realises Little Jack is growing up.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
programme.desc: A Canadian farmer takes on a giant corporation after their GMOs interfere with his crops.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Having been jilted at the altar, a literary aide to a controversial author thinks nothing of a fleeting liaison with a man she meets on a business flight.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman discovers her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her estranged best friend, who has left the Amish way of life.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna's obsessive fantasy of a perfect life with Leo shatters, forcing her to confront harsh reality and the truth about their relationship, with dire consequences.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2
programme.desc: Three years after narrowly escaping the murderous clutches of her half-sister Simone, Monica is ready for a fresh start in Seattle as host of the city's number one prime-time investigative program.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: When her cheating boyfriend is accused of murdering the head cheerleader, Sophie becomes involved in a race to discover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: The Podcast Murders
programme.desc: A true crime podcast host achieves massive success for her investigation of the serial killing case she calls the Barbie Murders. But her anonymity isn't the only thing being threatened.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Revenge For My Mother
programme.desc: Audrey teaches postnatal fitness to a group of mums who bring their baby strollers to the park, but when her recently-hired assistant secretly starts exacting revenge, Audrey's perfect world erupts into madness.
